improve.label: Improve Prompt
improve.description: Rewrite a user's prompt for better generation results

tagline: Qwen3 1.7B GGUF — invisible infrastructure for prompt improvement
description:
Small LLM (Qwen3 1.7B, Q4_K_M quantised GGUF) that runs on CPU via
llama-cpp-python. Aura uses it behind the scenes to improve user
prompts for image/audio/music generation. Not user-facing: no UI
controls, no model browser entry — invisible system component.
notes: Invisible infrastructure — NOT listed in catalogue.py, NOT shown in the model browser. Installed during first-launch onboarding as a "system component". See CLAUDE.md "LLM Runtime — Non-Negotiable".
GGUF weights baked into image at build time via hf_hub_download (unsloth/Qwen3-1.7B-GGUF — Q4_K_M quantisation, ~1.1 GB).
Uses Qwen3's `/no_think` sentinel to skip chain-of-thought blocks and save the token budget for the actual response.

Container listens on internal port 8000 (universal Aura convention); the host port is assigned dynamically at install time and stored in the model_ports table, like every other model. improver.py resolves it via storage.get_model_port.
